dataset: Pew Research Center — American Trends Panel Wave 145 (Global Attitudes US, 2024)
question_filter: value-labelled opinion items, 2-7 substantive options, base n>=50, ATP profile/admin vars (F_*, weights, device) excluded, DK/Refused dropped

cells.question: How would you describe the current economic situation in the U.S.?
When children today in the U.S. grow up, do you think they will be better off financially than their parents, or worse off financially than their parents?
options: Better off financially than their parents
Worse off financially than their parents

cells.question: How satisfied are you with the way democracy is working in the U.S.?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of The U.S.
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of China?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of The European Union?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of The United Nations?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of NATO, that is, North Atlantic Treaty Organization?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Russia?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of India?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Mexico?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Brazil?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of The United Kingdom?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of Germany?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of France?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of The Republican Party?
Do you have a favorable or unfavorable opinion of The Democratic Party?
How much confidence do you have in Chinese President Xi Jinping to do the right thing regarding world affairs?
How much confidence do you have in Russian President Vladimir Putin to do the right thing regarding world affairs?
How much confidence do you have in French President Emmanuel Macron to do the right thing regarding world affairs?
How much confidence do you have in Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to do the right thing regarding world affairs?
How much confidence do you have in Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to do the right thing regarding world affairs?
How much of a problem do you think The gap between the rich and poor is in the U.S. today?
How much of a problem do you think Unequal rights for men and women is in the U.S. today?
How much of a problem do you think Discrimination against people based on their race or ethnicity is in the U.S. today?
How much of a problem do you think Discrimination against people based on their religion is in the U.S. today?
How much of a problem do you think made-up news and information is in the country today?
How important is it to have The media can report the news without government censorship in our country?
How important is it to have People can say what they want without government censorship in our country?
How important is it to have People can use the internet without government censorship in our country?
And in the U.S. How free is the media to report the news?
And in the U.S. How free are people to say what they want?
And in the U.S. How free are people to use the internet?
How much, if at all, do you think That some people work harder than others to economic inequality in this country?
How much, if at all, do you think That some people are born with more opportunities than others to economic inequality in this country?
How much, if at all, do you think Discrimination against racial and ethnic minorities to economic inequality in this country?
How much, if at all, do you think Robots and computers doing work previously done by humans to economic inequality in this country?
How much, if at all, do you think Problems with our education system to economic inequality in this country?
How much, if at all, do you think Rich people have too much political influence to economic inequality in this country?
Thinking about the U.S., how much would you say the economic system needs to be changed, if at all?
options: It needs to be completely reformed
It doesn’t need to be changed

cells.question: Which statement comes closest to your own view, even if none are exactly right? Democracy in the U.S. is a good example for other countries to follow, used to be a good example, but has not been in recent years, or has never been a good example for other countries to follow?
options: Is a good example for other countries to follow
Used to be a good example, but has not been in recent years
Has never been a good example for other countries to follow

cells.question: Right now, which is more important for President Biden to focus on?
How important, if at all, is it that the U.S. is generally respected by other countries around the world?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Preventing the spread of weapons of mass destruction should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Strengthening the United Nations should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Reducing U.S. military commitments overseas should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Limiting the power and influence of Russia should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Promoting democracy in other nations should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Limiting the power and influence of China should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Maintaining the U.S. military advantage over all other countries should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Dealing with global climate change should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Finding a solution to the conflict between Israelis and Palestinians should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Reducing the flow of illegal drugs into our country should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think The U.S. being a leader in developing artificial intelligence should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Promoting and defending human rights in other countries should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Reducing the spread of infectious diseases should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Limiting the power and influence of Iran should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Taking measures to protect the U.S. from terrorist attacks should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Getting other countries to assume more of the costs of maintaining world order should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Aiding refugees fleeing violence around the world should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Limiting the power and influence of North Korea should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Strengthening NATO should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Supporting Israel should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think Supporting Ukraine should be given?
Thinking about long-range foreign policy goals, how much priority, if any, do you think The U.S. being a leader in space exploration should be given?
How important is Security and defense ties?
How important is Economic and trade ties?
How important is Shared democratic values?
For China, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For Russia, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For India, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For Germany, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For France, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For The United Kingdom, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For Iran, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For Brazil, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For The U.S., would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For NATO, that is, North Atlantic Treaty Organization, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For The European Union, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
For The United Nations, would you say its influence in the world in recent years has been getting stronger, getting weaker, or staying about the same?
On balance, do you think of China as a partner of the U.S., a competitor of the U.S. or an enemy of the U.S.?
On balance, do you think of Russia as a partner of the U.S., a competitor of the U.S. or an enemy of the U.S.?
How would you rate the job the U.S. government is doing dealing with the large number of people seeking asylum at the U.S. border with Mexico?
How would you rate the job the Mexican government is doing dealing with the large number of people seeking asylum at the U.S. border with Mexico?
How much influence do you think China is having on economic conditions in the U.S.?
Right now, is China having a positive or negative impact on economic conditions in the U.S.?
How concerned are you about territorial disputes between China and neighboring countries?

Some people say that the following things are important for being truly American. Others say they are not important for being truly American. How important do you think Being a Christian is to be truly American?

Some people say that the following things are important for being truly American. Others say they are not important for being truly American. How important do you think Being born in the United States is to be truly American?

Some people say that the following things are important for being truly American. Others say they are not important for being truly American. How important do you think Being able to speak English is to be truly American?

Some people say that the following things are important for being truly American. Others say they are not important for being truly American. How important do you think Sharing American customs and traditions is to be truly American?
How much, if at all, do you think the U.S. benefits from being a member of North Atlantic Treaty Organization, or NATO?
How much, if at all, do you think the U.S. benefits from being a member of The United Nations?
How much, if at all, do you think the U.S. benefits from being a member of The World Health Organization, or WHO?
How much confidence do you have in the ability of the United Nations to Provide effective humanitarian aid to Gaza?
How much confidence do you have in the ability of the United Nations to Enforce a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas?
Now thinking about American allies in Europe, do you think that our European allies’ spending on national defense should increase, decrease, or stay about the same?
When it comes to Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, do you think the U.S. is providing too much support to Ukraine, not enough support to Ukraine, or about the right amount of support to Ukraine?
options: About the right amount of support to Ukraine

cells.question: Do you think supporting Ukraine in its war against Russia helps U.S. national security, hurts U.S. national security, or has no impact on U.S. national security?
options: Has no impact on U.S. national security

cells.question: How concerned are you about the possibility of Ukraine being defeated and taken over by Russia?
How concerned are you about the possibility of Russia invading other countries in the region, not just Ukraine?

There are many kinds of groups in the world: different genders, ethnic and religious groups, nationalities, and political groups. Do you favor or oppose In setting priorities for the U.S., we must consider all groups?

There are many kinds of groups in the world: different genders, ethnic and religious groups, nationalities, and political groups. Do you favor or oppose We should NOT push for equality between all groups?
There are many kinds of groups in the world: different genders, ethnic and religious groups, nationalities, and political groups. Do you favor or oppose Group equality should be our ideal?

There are many kinds of groups in the world: different genders, ethnic and religious groups, nationalities, and political groups. Do you favor or oppose Superior groups should dominate inferior groups?
NATO is an international alliance with member states concentrated in which two regions of the world?
options: North America and the Asia Pacific
The Middle East and North Africa

cells.question: Which of the following is a central focus of NATO?
options: Reducing the effects of climate change
Promoting the security of its members

cells.question: Which of the following countries is NOT a member of NATO?
Overall, how important do you think the freedom of the press is to the well-being of society?
How much, if at all, do you think that U.S. news organizations are influenced by corporations and financial interests?
How much, if at all, do you think that U.S. news organizations are influenced by government and political interests?
How concerned are you, if at all, about potential restrictions on press freedoms in the United States?
Which comes closer to your own view, even if neither is exactly right?
options: The freedom of the press should always be protected, even if it means false information could be published
The publication of false information should always be prevented, even if it means the freedom of the press could be limi

cells.question: In your opinion, what is the best age to Get married?
In your opinion, what is the best age to Have your first child?
In your opinion, what is the best age to Buy a home?
In your opinion, what is the best age to Retire?
